mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TG001 AS warehousingSingle, TG002 AS warehousingNumber, TF003 AS warehousingDate,CMSMD.MD002 AS workShop, TG004 AS productNumber, TG005 AS productName, TG006 AS specification, TG007 AS unit, CAST(TG011 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS warehousingQuantity, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TG001) AS RowNum FROM MOCTF LEFT JOIN MOCTG ON TF001 = TG001 AND TF002 = TG002 LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON TF004 = MD003 AND TF011 = MD001 WHERE TF006 = 'Y' AND SUBSTRING(TF003, 1, ${type}) = SUBSTRING(#{warehousingDate},1,${type}) AND MD002 = #{workShop} ) AS SubQuery WHERE RowNum BETWEEN (#{page}-1) * #{pageSize} + 1 AND (#{page}-1) * #{pageSize} + #{pageSize};

SELECT count(*) FROM MOCTF LEFT JOIN MOCTG ON TF001 = TG001 AND TF002 = TG002 LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON TF004 = MD003 AND TF011 = MD001 WHERE TF006 = 'Y' AND SUBSTRING(TF003, 1, ${type}) = SUBSTRING(#{warehousingDate},1,${type}) AND MD002 = #{workShop}
SELECT count(*) FROM MOCTF LEFT JOIN MOCTG ON TF001 = TG001 AND TF002 = TG002 LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON TF004 = MD003 AND TF011 = MD001 WHERE TF006 = 'Y'
SELECT MD002 as workShop FROM CMSMD
